title: Eddy — fluid studio
description: A real-time, from-scratch incompressible Navier–Stokes fluid solver in pure TypeScript. Stable Fluids with semi-Lagrangian advection, an iterative pressure-projection Poisson solve, vorticity confinement, RGB dye that mixes like real ink, and arbitrary solid obstacles. Six interactive scenes — including a self-organising von Kármán vortex street that sheds alternating vortices behind a cylinder — plus paintable walls, dye/speed/vorticity/pressure visualisations with perceptual colour-maps, a velocity-field overlay, and live-tunable viscosity, vorticity, gravity and solver iterations.
